title.ko: 음악 표현; 악보 형식으로 음악 녹음 달리 제공되지 않는 음악 또는 음악 악기 용 액세서리,예. 지원 (악보대 A47B, 장난감 악기의 비 음악적 측면 A63H5/00, 메트로놈 G04F5/02, 음악 교육 G09B15/00)
title.en: REPRESENTATION OF MUSIC; RECORDING MUSIC IN NOTATION FORM; ACCESSORIES FOR MUSIC OR MUSICAL INSTRUMENTS NOT OTHERWISE PROVIDED FOR, e.g. SUPPORTS (music stands A47B;non-musical aspects of musical toy instruments A63H0005000000;metronomes G04F0005020000;teaching music G09B0015000000)
Means for the representation of music
Chord or note indicators, fixed or adjustable, for keyboards or fingerboards
Recording music in notation form, e.g. recording the mechanical operation of a musical instrument
Other auxiliary devices or accessories, e.g. conductors' batons or separate holders for resin or strings
